reason: Round 4 fix is correct: FR-58 test_fr58_must_not_c1 with sub-assertion q8_c1 satisfies Q8 for the CJK-only constraint 避免輪詢 using the sequential suffix fallback. All 9 negative_constraint tests map 1:1 to the embedded SRS constraint table. All 10 Step-1b risky modules have at least one Q6/1b/-tagged forced case. V3 math verifies: 169+125+24+4+27+40+30+9+14=442. FR-89 (無法裸讀) and FR-94 (拒絕明文) do not use Q8 trigger keywords and require no additional negative_constraint tests. No high or medium severity gaps found.
citations: Q8 rule (derive_test_cases.md): C_slug empty for CJK-only constraints → sequential suffix c1 accepted; test_fr58_must_not_c1 is correctly named
Step 1b rule (derive_test_cases.md): 'risky module with zero forced cases → REJECT' — all 10 modules have Q6/1b/-tagged cases; zero-case rule not violated
V2 (derive_test_cases.md Q8 keyword list): 無法 and 拒絕 are not in the Q8 trigger set (Must not, Do not, 禁止, 不可, 避免); FR-89 and FR-94 require no negative_constraint tests
Checklist: cross-cutting section present with ≥1 deployment smoke test (test_deploy_docker_compose_all_services_healthy et al.)

gaps.message: test_fr100_clamav_timeout_terminates_scan (test #7) asserts expected_terminated='true' but lacks an explicit orphan/cleanup sub-assertion verifying the subprocess is reaped after kill. The Step 1b NP-15 external process pattern requires both timeout enforcement and orphan/cleanup assertion. Carry-over from round 3; does not escalate.

Step 1b 'Required case shape' for network client / retry logic modules specifies test_{fr}_retry_backoff_bounded, but no test with that exact name exists for paladin, knowledge, aee, llm_judge, or jobs modules. Semantically equivalent backoff tests exist (e.g., test_fr76_queue_unavailable_job_retried_with_backoff tagged Q6/1b/NP-07). The zero-forced-cases rejection threshold is not met since each module has ≥1 Q6/1b/ case, but strict name-shape compliance is absent.
